definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="entity_nbt_num_set"><comment pinned="false" h="67" w="151">Total tank capacity in Gallons (average car is about 12 Gallons)</comment><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">FuelCapacity</field><comment pinned="false" h="35" w="306">The name of your ( Fuel Capacity ) NBT variable.</comment></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">24</field><comment pinned="false" h="50" w="143">The average is about 12 Gallons for a car.</comment></block></value><next><block type="entity_nbt_num_set"><comment pinned="false" h="47" w="306">Fuel efficiency per meter (1 block at 1.0 velocity). The average car is about (0.041) milliliters.</comment><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">FuelEfficiency</field><comment pinned="false" h="36" w="316">The name of your ( Fuel Efficiency ) NBT variable.</comment></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.005</field><comment pinned="false" h="48" w="147">Average for a car is about 0.041 milliliters</comment></block></value><next><block type="entity_nbt_num_set"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Gow much fuel the car vehicle has when it spawns.</comment><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Fuel</field><comment pinned="false" h="34" w="252">The name of your ( Fuel ) NBT variable.</comment></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Leave the value at 0 if you want it to be empty when it is spawned.</comment></block></value><next><block type="entity_nbt_num_set"><comment pinned="false" h="35" w="244">This sets the maximum gear number.</comment><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">MaxVehicleGear</field><comment pinned="false" h="34" w="336">The name of your ( Max Vehicle Gear ) NBT variable.</comment></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field><comment pinned="false" h="49" w="278">Cars normally only have 5 forward gears. Default is 5 gears.</comment></block></value><next><block type="entity_nbt_num_set"><comment pinned="false" h="34" w="308">This sets the minimum gear number (for reverse)</comment><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">MinVehicleGear</field><comment pinned="false" h="36" w="331">The name of your ( Min Vehicle Gear ) NBT variable.</comment></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">-1</field><comment pinned="false" h="47" w="222">Cars normaly have 1 reverse gear. Default value is -1</comment></block></value><next><block type="entity_nbt_num_set"><comment pinned="false" h="51" w="221">This sets the default gear number when the entity is spawned.</comment><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">VehicleGear</field><comment pinned="false" h="36" w="313">The name of your ( Vehicle Gear ) NBT variable.</comment></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field><comment pinned="false" h="33" w="181">Recommended to be in 0.0</comment></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
